rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the missing @[simp] on fiberHomeomorph_one, but Review 2 also finds a concrete, verifiable API bloat issue: coe_eq_of_mem_stabilizer_fiber and mem_stabilizer_fiber_of_coe_eq are literally just .mp and .mpr of the already-present iff lemma (confirmed against the diff), adding surface with no independent content. Review 1's unique finding — adding fiberHomeomorph_inv — is speculative since the diff only shows a MonoidHom and we cannot confirm from it that Deck p carries the required group inverse structure at this stage; acting on it risks adding premature API. Removing the two redundant wrappers is a cleaner, unambiguously correct API-design improvement.
